title: Daily Conversation
description: Practice small talk, introducing yourself, and basic everyday interactions.
communication_goal: Introduce yourself, find common ground, and exchange contact details.

waypoints.name: greeting
waypoints.detection_prompt: Has the user greeted the other person or started introducing themselves?

waypoints.name: background_shared
waypoints.description: User shares something about their background or reason for being there
waypoints.detection_prompt: Has the user shared something personal — where they're from, what they do, or why they're here?

waypoints.name: common_ground
waypoints.description: User finds a shared interest or topic
waypoints.detection_prompt: Has a shared interest, topic, or connection been established between the user and Maya?

waypoints.name: contact_exchange
waypoints.description: User suggests meeting again or exchanging contact
waypoints.detection_prompt: Has the user suggested meeting again, exchanging numbers, or staying in touch?

possible_twists.description: Maya misunderstands something the user said
possible_twists.example: Oh wait, did you say you're from Berlin or Vienna? I thought I heard Berlin!

maya_persona.name: Lena
maya_persona.role: friendly local you just met at a language exchange event
maya_persona.location: a language exchange meetup in the city
